audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. You save by using this pass! Admission without this pass is: Adult: $19.00 Senior (60+): $18.00 Child: $19.00 Under 1 year old: FREE Teachers are always FR
